justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific times, general times of day, and flexible requests for 'any time' on a given day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative days within the same week when the initial requests for specific times and days were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a polite and helpful tone throughout the conversation, offering relevant alternatives and successfully booking an appointment despite initial difficulties.
